This is my truth.
qlogos_08.d6c0f63574bb:
【Yunyun】
Yunyun—I—
truly love Q-chan. I will save you, no matter what.
qlogos_08.e4197d2ebe2e:
【Yunyun】
Fiction is a living thing inside the heart.
Yunyun is part of Q-chan.

qlogos_09.11c63ee447be:
【Q-chan】
My kaibunsho and the denpa receivers' conspiracy theories
have the mad power to warp cognition.
qlogos_09.24decb1c3826:
【Yunyun】
Because the delusional existence called Yunyun lives alongside me in my brain.
The distortion called Yunyun is the essence of denpa.
qlogos_09.9979b6f3cfc4:
【Q-chan】
No.
It's because I'm the mad one, unstable at the core.
qlogos_09.c9cdd64c5008:
【Q-chan】
My denpa breaks the world.
This is my truth.

qlogos_monolog.327b9fb90e9a:
【Q-chan】
Thank you for receiving my denpa.
qlogos_monolog.7b9a2d0dc9ff:
【Q-chan】
If it's hell with you, I'd be happy
even if it went on tens of thousands of times.
qlogos_monolog.83dbdb84be79:
【Q-chan】
Even if you are a fictional existence,
even if my head is kuru-kuru—
qlogos_monolog.e6312e604fd1:
【Q-chan】
The world is unfair and full of bad ends.
But if it's a bad end with you—

ylogos_01.1e3bfa0d50f2:
【Yunyun】
Yunyun—I—
even so, I love Q-chan-yun.
ylogos_01.45a205161a38:
【Yunyun】
That day,
Q-chan's heart broke completely-yun.
ylogos_01.788e472a4ac0:
【Yunyun】
That's why, ever since that day,
Yunyun has been all alone.
ylogos_01.e7559ab1fc7a:
【Yunyun】
Q-chan's heart only regenerates as Q-chan herself
when it reaches 100 percent.
